dc:title: Ecology and Evolution Corpus (2011-2026)
dc:creator: Lakens, Daniel
dc:subject: ecology
evolutionary biology
open access
natural language processing
AI validation
text mining
dc:description: A stratified random sample of 1,543 articles published in Ecology and Evolution between 2011 and 2026, converted to metacheck paperlist objects for validation of AI and text-mining tools. Ecology and Evolution is a fully open-access Wiley journal; Wiley's own PDF host is blocked by Cloudflare bot protection, so PDFs were retrieved via each article's Europe PMC deposit instead.
dc:rights: Mixed CC-BY 4.0, CC-BY 3.0, and CC-BY-NC 3.0, depending on the article -- see manifest.csv

dc:provenance.sampling: 100 articles per year (target), stratified random sample, seed 20260621, reduced in some years by download failures and one excluded non-article notice
dc:provenance.oa_verification: Unpaywall API, checked per article (fully open-access journal; all 1,579 sampled articles confirmed is_oa: TRUE)
dc:provenance.pdf_source: Europe PMC (onlinelibrary.wiley.com is Cloudflare-protected and blocks automated downloads)
dc:provenance.doi_matching: Verified against CrossRef DOI used for sampling (2026-06-21)
dc:provenance.quality_audit: 1 mistyped non-article notice replaced (empty-title erratum), 11 oversized PDFs excluded, 34 garbled DOIs corrected, 10 missing titles backfilled from CrossRef, two full reruns of the download script to recover intermittent API failures (83% -> 98.4% yield)
